final_value: Onboard customers onto Mistral AI products and guide deployment and integration.
Design and ensure production setups spanning GPU infrastructure, back-end systems and front-end interfaces.
Deploy state-of-the-art AI applications across consumer and industrial use cases.
Work with researchers, AI engineers and product engineers on complex customer projects involving deployment and scaling.
Contribute to open-source codebases for tasks such as inference and fine-tuning.
Participate in pre-sales calls to understand client needs, challenges and objectives.
Provide technical guidance on Mistral AI products and explain the technology to technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Own end-to-end execution of high-stakes projects in small teams.

stamp_1.check: Each extracted responsibility appears in the role overview or 'What you will do' section.

stamp_2.check: The list covers customer onboarding, deployment, production setup, collaboration, open source, pre-sales and end-to-end ownership without including profile requirements.

final_value: Be fluent in English.
Hold a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering or a related field.
Have at least 2 years of experience in a DevOps or Site Reliability Engineering role.
Have experience deploying and managing AI-based products in production environments.
Be fluent in Python.
Have experience with Docker and Kubernetes.
Have experience with CI/CD pipelines and automated deployment tools.
Have a deep understanding of AWS, Azure or GCP and of on-premises infrastructure.
Have experience with infrastructure-as-code tools such as Terraform or Ansible.
Possess strong communication skills and be able to explain complex technical concepts simply.

stamp_1.check: Every extracted requirement appears under the explicit 'About you' section.

stamp_2.check: The degree, 2+ years, production AI, Python, containers, CI/CD, cloud, IaC and communication requirements are all preserved without adding unlisted technologies.

evidence: deploying and managing AI-based products in production environments

final_value: Experience as a Customer Engineer, Forward Deployed Engineer, Sales Engineer, Solutions Architect or Technical Product Manager.
Familiarity with AI frameworks such as PyTorch or TensorFlow.
Contributions to open-source projects in DevOps or AI.
